items.title: Liam McNeeley is all about putting in that work this summer.
items.author: Rod Boone
items.body_excerpt:
Liam McNeeley is all about putting in that work this summer.

"There’s no off days," he told me.

Specifics on what McNeeley wants to do and how he plans to improve heading into second season. #nbasky

media.title: ‘There’s no off days’: Hornets’ Liam McNeeley reveals plan to improve
media.description: The 6-foot-7 forward split time playing for the Hornets and G League’s Greensboro Swarm in rookie NBA season.
